project_type: Next.js 16 website with Tailwind CSS 3.4, Framer Motion 11.3
verification_instructions: Run npm run build from /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim and confirm zero errors
contribution_requirements: Commit on main branch, do not push
key_patterns: Colors are defined in two places: tailwind.config.ts (navy 50-950 scale and gold 300-700 scale) and src/app/globals.css (CSS custom properties --navy, --gold, etc. plus utility classes like .gold-text, .gold-divider, .shimmer-btn). Many components reference these colors directly via Tailwind classes (navy-950, gold-500, gold-300, etc.) and via CSS custom properties in globals.css. The current palette is navy (#0B2E4F) + gold (#D4AF37). The logo colors are: deep navy ~#1B3A5C, rich gold/amber gradient ~#C68A2E to ~#D4A032, dark navy outline ~#0F2D4A.
directory_structure: src/app/ contains pages (page.tsx, about/page.tsx, products/page.tsx, etc.), globals.css, layout.tsx. src/components/ contains Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, ContactForm.tsx, ScrollToTop.tsx. src/components/sections/ contains all homepage sections (HeroSection, FeaturedProducts, etc.). public/ has logo.png and logo-mark.png. tailwind.config.ts at root.
